mapper.update: UPDATE USER_INFO SET fail_cnt = fail_cnt + 1 WHERE user_id = #{user_id}
UPDATE USER_INFO SET is_locked = 'Y' WHERE user_id = #{user_id}
UPDATE USER_INFO SET fail_cnt = 0 WHERE user_id = #{user_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_INFO (user_id, password, user_name, role, allowed_ip) VALUES (#{user_id}, #{password}, #{user_name}, #{role}, #{allowed_ip})
